name: bedtime_skipped_manual_override_active
description: Warm day: user bumps thermostat at 21:00 (override confirmed). Bedtime fires at 22:30. In production, an active manual override suppresses bedtime setback. The simulator currently clears override at bedtime and applies setback â€” so this assertion is simulator_support:false pending Gap 3 (override confirm delay) fix.
notes: Production behavior (Issue #204): if manual_override_active at bedtime, setback is skipped.
Simulator current behavior: _handle_bedtime() sets manual_override_active=False unconditionally,
then applies setback regardless. So 'bedtime_setback_skipped' is NOT produced by the simulator.
This scenario uses simulator_support:false on the skip assertion until Gap 3 (override confirm)
is implemented and bedtime logic respects the override flag.
The override_confirmed assertion is also simulator_support:false (Gap 3 â€” confirm delay not modeled).
Covers Priority 5 bedtime+override from plan abundant-mapping-clarke.md.

events.note: Afternoon classification â€” cool mode at comfort_cool=74F
User bumps thermostat to heat/72F â€” override detection starts 10-min confirm window
10-min confirm window passes with override still active â€” override_confirmed fires in production
Bedtime fires while override active â€” in production: setback skipped; in simulator: setback applied (Gap 3)

assertions.reason: Afternoon classification at home â€” cool mode at comfort_cool=74F
10 minutes after initial override detection, thermostat still diverges â€” override confirmed
assertions.gap: Gap 3 (override confirm delay) not yet in simulator â€” override accepted immediately, no 'override_confirmed' outcome

assertions.reason: Manual override active at bedtime â€” setback suppressed to avoid fighting user's intent
assertions.gap: Simulator _handle_bedtime() clears override and applies setback unconditionally; production checks override first

verdict.summary: Manual override active at bedtime: setback skipped (production); simulator does not yet model this
verdict.expected_behavior: Bedtime setback suppressed when manual override is active (Issue #204 fix validation)
